description: Free-text fields for the rubric-stability test (Tier 2b). Each field is scored 5x; the std-dev of the normalised score must be <= 0.15. Requires a live Ollama model; skipped with a stub client otherwise.

fields.text: We help Tunisian smallholder olive farmers cut post-harvest losses by 30% with a solar-powered cold-storage micro-unit, validated with 12 cooperatives in Sfax who signed letters of intent.
Unlike imported industrial coolers, our unit is sized for 2-5 hectare farms, runs off-grid, and is serviced locally through a network of trained technicians we certify.
First off-grid cold-chain product designed specifically for the fragmented Tunisian olive sector, combining a novel phase-change material with a pay-per-use financing model.
Our brand positions cold storage as a yield-protection service rather than equipment, with a recognisable green-and-gold identity tied to Tunisian agricultural heritage.
Directly advances SDG 2 (Zero Hunger) by reducing food loss and SDG 7 (Affordable Clean Energy) through solar operation, with a target of cutting 500 tonnes of CO2 per year.
